popularStory.headline: en.Wikipedia Mary Tudor, Duchess of Suffolk
popularStory.description: Mary Tudor (/ˈtjuːdər/; 18 March 1496 – 25 June 1533) was an English princess who was briefly Queen consort of France. She was the younger surviving daughter of King Henry VII of England and Elizabeth …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Tudor於1496年3月18日出生在英國素瑞里士滿時，她的父親Henry VII King of England39歲，母親Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England30歲。她於1514年10月9日與Louis XII Roi de France在法國皮卡迪索姆阿別維爾結婚。她去世於1533年6月25日在英國英格蘭素福爾可維斯索普享年37歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Tudor于1496年3月18日出生在英国素瑞里士滿时，她的父亲Henry VII King of England39岁，母亲Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England30岁。她于1514年10月9日与Louis XII Roi de France在法国皮卡迪索姆阿別維爾结婚。她去世于1533年6月25日在英国英格兰素福爾可維斯索普享年37岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Tudur, a derivative of British Celtic Toutorīx, literally ‘people’ + ‘king’. It has sometimes been taken as a Welsh equivalent of Latin Theodorus, from Greek Theodōros ‘gift of God’ (see Theodore ), for which the usual Welsh form is Tewdwr.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Tudor, a variant of Teodor (see Theodore ).

History: The Tudor royal family, English sovereigns from the accession of Henry VII in 1485 to the death of Elizabeth I in 1603, were of Welsh origin, being descended from Owain ap Maredudd ap Tudur, who held lands at Penmynydd in Anglesey.

variants.name: Theodore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Serge, Henri, Pierre, Alide, Andre, Antoine, Benoit, Berthony, Chantal, Daphnee, Edouard, Guilene.

French and Mauritian (Théodore); West Indian (in Haiti, Martinique, and Guadeloupe Théodore); English and Welsh: from a personal name derived from Greek Theodōros, a compound of theos ‘God’ + dōron ‘gift’, which was relatively popular in the Middle Ages because of its auspicious meaning. The name was borne by several early Christian saints. There was considerable confusion with the ancient Germanic name Theodoric (see Terry ). In Wales, the personal name Theodore was also adopted as an approximation to the Welsh name Tewdwr (see Tudor ). In North America, this surname has absorbed various other European cognates and their derivatives, e.g. Greek Theodorakis , Macedonian Todorovski, and Serbian Todorović (see Todorovic ).

variants.name: Tedder
meanings: English (Surrey): from the Middle English personal name Thedere, Teddere, which is either from the Old English personal name Thēodhere (from thēod ‘people’ + here ‘army’) or from the cognate ancient Germanic personal name Theudher, which seems to have been adopted by the Normans. Alternatively, perhaps it may be an occupational name from Middle English teddere ‘one who teds’, i.e. a person whose occupation was to spread mown grass for drying.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Tudor was born on 18 March 1496, in Richmond, Surrey, England, her father, Henry VII King of England, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England, was 30. She married Louis XII Roi de France on 9 October 1514, in Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, France. She died on 25 June 1533, in Westhorpe, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Tudor est née le 18 mars 1496, à Richmond, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Henry VII King of England, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Louis XII Roi de France le 9 octobre 1514, à Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, France. Elle est décédée le 25 juin 1533, à Westhorpe, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Tudor am 18. März 1496 in Richmond, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry VII King of England 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England 30. Sie hat am 9. Oktober 1514 in Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Louis XII Roi de France geheiratet. Sie starb am 25. Juni 1533 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Westhorpe, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Tudor è nata il il 18 marzo 1496 nel Richmond, Surrey, England, sua padre, Henry VII King of England, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Louis XII Roi de France il 9 ottobre 1514, nel Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Morì il 25 giugno 1533, nel Westhorpe, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Tudorが1496年3月18日にイギリススリーリチモンドで生まれた時，父Henry VII King of Englandは39歳，母Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of Englandは30歳であった。1514年10月9日にフランスピカーディソンメアベヴィルでLouis XII Roi de Franceと結婚した。彼女は1533年6月25日にイギリスイギリススフォルクウエスソルペで37歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Tudor(이)가 1496년 3월 18일 영국 수리 리ch몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry VII King of England(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1514년 10월 9일 프랑스 피카디 솜 애브베빌에서 Louis XII Roi de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1533년 6월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 웨스소에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.18 March 1496–25 June 1533: 18 de março de 1496–25 de junho de 1533
pt.from 9 October 1514 to 1 January 1515: de 9 de outubro de 1514 a 1 de janeiro de 1515
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Tudor nasceu em 18 de março de 1496, em Richmond, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry VII King of England, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis XII Roi de France em 9 de outubro de 1514, em Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, França. Ela faleceu em 25 de junho de 1533, em Westhorpe, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Tudor родилась 18 марта 1496 г. в местности ричмонд, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry VII King of England было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis XII Roi de France 9 октября 1514 г. в местности эббевилл, сомм, пикарди, Франция. Она умерла 25 июня 1533 г. в местности вестаурп, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Tudor nació el 18 de marzo de 1496, en Richmond, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry VII King of England, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth of York Queen Consort of England, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Louis XII Roi de France el 9 de octubre de 1514, en Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Murió el 25 de junio de 1533, en Westhorpe, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
